_meta.confidence_note: spec confidence: high = stable encyclopedia facts; medium = worth one specs-researcher pass before final tuning (Phase 24)

buildings.name: CN Tower
buildings.notes: grey concrete, glass pods; hero mesh spec §5

buildings.name: Aura (Yonge/Gerrard)
buildings.notes: dark blue-grey glass — closest §4 enum is glass_blue; spec describes a blue-grey tint, not pure blue

buildings.name: CIBC Square (81 Bay)
buildings.notes: blue glass, banded Round-6 researcher confirmed 241.3 m / 49 floors (south tower; north is 243.1/50).

buildings.name: Commerce Court W (CIBC)
buildings.notes: stainless + grey glass — no plain 'grey glass' enum exists; mapped to glass_black as the closest dark-reflective curtain-wall match

buildings.name: The Well tower
buildings.notes: glass on red-brick podium — spec doesn't name a glass tint; mapped to glass_blue as the default modern-glass enum, brick podium called out separately Round-6 researcher confirmed 174 m / 46 floors (tallest tower of the complex).

buildings.name: Hullmark (Yonge/Shep)
buildings.notes: blue-green twin — no blue-green enum; mapped to glass_green (closer than glass_blue given 'green' is named second/dominant) Round-6: corrected 161->167.94 m (South Tower; twin with a 37-floor North Tower). Render as a twin pair.

buildings.name: Emerald Park (Yonge/Shep)
buildings.notes: GREEN curved twin Round-6: dual towers 41 (East) + 32 (West) floors; 147 m height UNVERIFIED (researcher budget) - treat as estimate. Render as a twin pair.

buildings.name: Rogers Centre
buildings.notes: 86 m is roof height (no floor count applies — domed stadium); white/grey panels

buildings.name: Eaton Centre galleria
buildings.footprint_note: 129 long (round-6 verified real galleria length 400 m via the half-scale rule; supersedes the spec table's illustrative 84 - derived truth wins, same principle as the P21 zone scales)
buildings.notes: glass barrel vault — spec doesn't name a tint; mapped to glass_blue as the default clear/modern-glass enum

buildings.name: Casa Loma
buildings.notes: grey stone castle — mapped to limestone, the only quarried-stone enum (§4 has no separate 'grey stone')

buildings.name: Union Station
buildings.notes: limestone colonnade Round-6 researcher confirmed Front St facade 229 m -> 74 wu via the half-scale rule EXACTLY.
